ModMetaData.name: Medieval Overhaul - Engineering Requires Alchemy
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description: Adds Medieval Overhaul's Alchemy research as a prerequisite of its Engineering research, so Alchemy must be completed first. Both researches are needed to build the advanced research bench; this enforces the ordering in the research tree. Requires Medieval Overhaul.
